documentation.description:
Note: this package is in the System hierarchy so that it can be directly
be used by other predefined packages. User access to this package is via
a renaming of this package in GNAT.String (file g-string.ads).

array_types.name: String_List
array_types.code: type String_List is array (Positive range <>) of String_Access;

documentation.description: General purpose array and pointer for list of string accesses

access_types.name: String_Access
access_types.code: type String_Access is access all String;

documentation.description:
General purpose string access type. Note that the caller is
responsible for freeing allocated strings to avoid memory leaks.

access_types.name: String_List_Access
access_types.code: type String_List_Access is access all String_List;

documentation.description: General purpose array and pointer for list of string accesses

Frees the given array and all strings that its elements reference,
and then sets the argument to null. Provided for freeing allocated
values of this type.

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation
  (Object => String, Name => String_Access);

documentation.description:
This procedure is provided for freeing allocated values of type
String_Access.
